message:
fix(clippy,main): resolve 3 clippy lints blocking agent validation and surface silent provenance errors

Clippy fixes (unblock rch cargo clippy for all agents):
- canonical_serializer.rs: `% 2 == 0` → `.is_multiple_of(2)`
- crdt.rs: `map_or(true, ...)` → `.is_none_or(...)`
- lane_scheduler.rs: complex tuple type → `StarvationRow` type alias

main.rs:
- build_registry_seed_request and build_registry_publish_request now
  return Result<RegistrationRequest> instead of silently discarding
  sign_links_in_place errors via `let _ =`
- provenance_commit_prefix helper prevents potential panic on
  short hash strings via `[..12]` slice
- New test for short-hash robustness

Beads: bd-3q0xk, bd-lb629

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
